Agent:: SystemArchitect
Input Artifacts:
  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: News Portal - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.   - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.   - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.   - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.  ### 2. Article Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Article Catalog - **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.   - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.   - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).   - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.   - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).  ### 3. Article Details Page - **Page Title**: Article Details - **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article. - **Elements**:   - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.   - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.   - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.   - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.   - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.   - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.  ### 4. Bookmarks Page - **Page Title**: My Bookmarks - **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options. - **Elements**:   - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.   - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.   - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).   - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 5. Comments Page - **Page Title**: Article Comments - **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments. - **Elements**:   - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.   - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.   - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.   - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. Write Comment Page - **Page Title**: Write a Comment - **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.   - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.   - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.   - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.   - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.  ### 7. Trending Articles Page - **Page Title**: Trending Articles - **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement. - **Elements**:   - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.   - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.   - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).   - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Category Page - **Page Title**: Category Articles - **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category. - **Elements**:   - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.   - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.   - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.   - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.   - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 9. Search Results Page - **Page Title**: Search Results - **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query. - **Elements**:   - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.   - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.   - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.   - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. Articles Data - **File Name**: `articles.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891   ```  ### 2. Categories Data - **File Name**: `categories.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   category_id|category_name|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations   2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage   3|Business|Business and finance news   ```  ### 3. Bookmarks Data - **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20   2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18   ```  ### 4. Comments Data - **File Name**: `comments.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20   2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19   ```  ### 5. Trending Data - **File Name**: `trending.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month   ```

Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: News Portal - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.   - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.   - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.   - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.  ### 2. Article Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Article Catalog - **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.   - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.   - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).   - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.   - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).  ### 3. Comments Page - **Page Title**: Article Comments - **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments. - **Elements**:   - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.   - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.   - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.   - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. Write Comment Page - **Page Title**: Write a Comment - **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.   - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.   - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.   - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.   - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.  ### 7. Trending Articles Page - **Page Title**: Trending Articles - **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement. - **Elements**:   - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.   - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.   - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).   - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Category Page - **Page Title**: Category Articles - **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category. - **Elements**:   - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.   - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.   - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.   - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.   - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 9. Search Results Page - **Page Title**: Search Results - **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query. - **Elements**:   - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.   - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.   - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.   - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. Articles Data - **File Name**: `articles.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891   ```  ### 2. Categories Data - **File Name**: `categories.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   category_id|category_name|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations   2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage   3|Business|Business and finance news   ```  ### 3. Bookmarks Data - **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20   2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18   ```  ### 4. Comments Data - **File Name**: `comments.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20   2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19   ```  ### 5. Trending Data - **File Name**: `trending.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month   ```

# Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Article Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).
  - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).

### 3. Article Details Page
- **Page Title**: Article Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.
  - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.
  - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.
  - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.
  - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.
  - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- **Page Title**: My Bookmarks
- **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.
  - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. Comments Page
- **Page Title**: Article Comments
- **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.
  - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.
  - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.
  - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Write Comment Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Comment
- **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.
  - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.
  - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.
  - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.
  - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- **Page Title**: Trending Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.
  - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Category Page
- **Page Title**: Category Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.
  - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.
  - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.
  - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.
  - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 9. Search Results Page
- **Page Title**: Search Results
- **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.
  - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.
  - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.
  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Articles Data
- **File Name**: `articles.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- **File Name**: `comments.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- **File Name**: `trending.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

# Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).

### 3. Article Details Page

### 7. Trending Articles Page

  - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).

  - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.
  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Articles Data
- **File Name**: `articles.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- **File Name**: `comments.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- **File Name**: `trending.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Article Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).
  - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).

### 3. Article Details Page
- **Page Title**: Article Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.
  - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.
  - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.
  - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.
  - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.
  - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- **Page Title**: My Bookmarks
- **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.
  - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. Comments Page
- **Page Title**: Article Comments
- **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.
  - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.
  - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.
  - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Write Comment Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Comment
- **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.
  - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.
  - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.
  - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.
  - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- **Page Title**: Trending Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.
  - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Category Page
- **Page Title**: Category Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.
  - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.
  - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.
  - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.
  - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 9. Search Results Page
- **Page Title**: Search Results
- **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.
  - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.
  - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.
  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Articles Data
- **File Name**: `articles.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- **File Name**: `comments.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- **File Name**: `trending.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Article Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).
  - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).

### 3. Article Details Page
- **Page Title**: Article Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.
  - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.
  - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.
  - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.
  - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.
  - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- **Page Title**: My Bookmarks
- **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.
  - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. Comments Page
- **Page Title**: Article Comments
- **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.
  - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.
  - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.
  - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Write Comment Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Comment
- **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.
  - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.
  - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.
  - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.
  - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- **Page Title**: Trending Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.
  - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Category Page
- **Page Title**: Category Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.
  - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.
  - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.
  - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.
  - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 9. Search Results Page
- **Page Title**: Search Results
- **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.
  - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.
  - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.
  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Articles Data
- **File Name**: `articles.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- **File Name**: `comments.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- **File Name**: `trending.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

Bookmarks Data - **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20   2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18   ```  ### 4. Comments Data - **File Name**: `comments.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20   2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19   ```  ### 5. Trending Data - **File Name**: `trending.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month   ```

HTML Template Specifications\n\n### Common Jinja2 Usage\n- Use `{{ variable_name }}` for injecting context variables.\n- Use Jinja2 control structures `{% %}` for loops and conditional rendering.\n- Use `url_for('function_name', **kwargs)` for URL routing.\n\n---\n\n### 1. dashboard.html\n- File: `templates/dashboard.html`\n- Page Title: `News Portal`\n- H1 Title: `Dashboard`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `dashboard-page` (Div): Container for the dashboard page.\n  - `featured-articles` (Div): Display area for featured articles.\n  - `browse-articles-button` (Button): Navigates to article catalog page.\n  - `view-bookmarks-button` (Button): Navigates to bookmarks page.\n  - `trending-articles-button` (Button): Navigates to trending articles page.\n- Context Variables:\n  - `dashboard_page_id`: string\n  - `featured_articles_id`: string\n  - `browse_articles_button_id`: string\n  - `view_bookmarks_button_id`: string\n  - `trending_articles_button_id`: string\n- Navigation Mappings:\n  - `browse-articles-button` triggers navigation to route `article_catalog`.\n  - `view-bookmarks-button` triggers navigation to route `bookmarks_page`.\n  - `trending-articles-button` triggers navigation to route `trending_articles_page`.\n\n---\n\n### 2. articles.html\n- File: `templates/articles.html`\n- Page Title: `Article Catalog`\n- H1 Title: `Article Catalog`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `catalog-page` (Div): Container for the article catalog.\n  - `search-input` (Input): Text field for searching articles.\n  - `category-filter` (Dropdown): Filter articles by category.\n  - `articles-grid` (Div): Grid container displaying article cards.\n  - `view-article-button-{{ article_id }}` (Button): Button inside each article card to view details.\n- Context Variables:\n  - `catalog_page_id`: string\n  - `search_input_id`: string\n  - `category_filter_id`: string\n  - `articles_grid_id`: string\n  - `articles`: list of dict (each with keys: article_id, title, author, date, thumbnail_url)\n- Navigation Mappings:\n  - Each `view-article-button-{{ article_id }}` triggers navigation to route `article_details` with article_id parameter.\n\n---\n\n### 3. article_details.html\n- File: `templates/article_details.html`\n- Page Title: `Article Details`\n- H1 Title: Article title dynamically inserted.\n- Element IDs:\n  - `article-details-page` (Div): Container for article details page.\n  - `article-title` (H1): Displays the article title.\n  - `article-author` (Div): Displays the article author.\n  - `article-date` (Div): Displays the publication date.\n  - `bookmark-button` (Button): Button to add the article to bookmarks.\n  - `article-content` (Div): Displays the full article content.\n- Context Variables:\n  - `article_details_page_id`: string\n  - `article_title`: string\n  - `article_author`: string\n  - `article_date`: string\n  - `article_content`: string\n- Navigation Mappings:\n  - `bookmark-button` triggers backend action to save bookmark via AJAX or POST (not specified here).\n\n---\n\n### 4. bookmarks.html\n- File: `templates/bookmarks.html`\n- Page Title: `My Bookmarks`\n- H1 Title: `My Bookmarks`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `bookmarks-page` (Div): Container for bookmarks page.\n  - `bookmarks-list` (Div): List container of bookmarks.\n  - `remove-bookmark-button-{{ bookmark_id }}` (Button): Button to remove a bookmark.\n  - `read-bookmark-button-{{ bookmark_id }}` (Button): Button to read bookmarked article.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard.\n- Context Variables:\n  - `bookmarks_page_id`: string\n  - `bookmarks_list`: list of dict (keys: bookmark_id, article_title, bookmarked_date)\n- Navigation Mappings:\n  - `remove-bookmark-button-{{ bookmark_id }}` triggers bookmark removal.\n  - `read-bookmark-button-{{ bookmark_id }}` navigates to article details for the bookmarked article.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` navigates to dashboard.\n\n---\n\n### 5. comments.html\n- File: `templates/comments.html`\n- Page Title: `Article Comments`\n- H1 Title: `Comments`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `comments-page` (Div): Container for comments page.\n  - `comments-list` (Div): List container displaying comments.\n  - `write-comment-button` (Button): Navigate to write comment page.\n  - `filter-by-article` (Dropdown): Filter comments by article.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.\n- Context Variables:\n  - `comments_page_id`: string\n  - `comments_list`: list of dict (keys: article_title, commenter_name, comment_text, comment_date)\n- Navigation Mappings:\n  - `write-comment-button` navigates to `write_comment_page` route.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` navigates to dashboard.\n\n---\n\n### 6. write_comment.html\n- File: `templates/write_comment.html`\n- Page Title: `Write a Comment`\n- H1 Title: `Write a Comment`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `write-comment-page` (Div): Container for the write comment page.\n  - `select-article` (Dropdown): Select article to comment on.\n  - `commenter-name` (Input): Input field for commenter name.\n  - `comment-text` (Textarea): Textarea for comment text.\n  - `submit-comment-button` (Button): Submit comment button.\n- Context Variables:\n  - `write_comment_page_id`: string\n  - `articles`: list of dict (keys: article_id, title)\n- Navigation Mappings:\n  - `submit-comment-button` submits comment form (POST to `/write-comment` expected).\n\n---\n\n### 7. trending.html\n- File: `templates/trending.html`\n- Page Title: `Trending Articles`\n- H1 Title: `Trending Articles`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `trending-page` (Div): Container for trending articles.\n  - `trending-list` (Div): Display ranked list of trending articles.\n  - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter trending by time period.\n  - `view-article-button-{{ article_id }}` (Button): View article details button.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.\n- Context Variables:\n  - `trending_page_id`: string\n  - `trending_articles`: list of dict (keys: article_id, title, category, view_count, rank)\n- Navigation Mappings:\n  - `view-article-button-{{ article_id }}` navigates to `article_details` route.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` navigates to dashboard.\n\n---\n\n### 8. category.html\n- File: `templates/category.html`\n- Page Title: `Category Articles`\n- H1 Title: Category name dynamically displayed\n- Element IDs:\n  - `category-page` (Div): Container for category page.\n  - `category-title` (H1): Displays category name.\n  - `category-articles` (Div): List of articles in the category.\n  - `sort-by-date` (Button): Sort articles by date.\n  - `sort-by-popularity` (Button): Sort articles by popularity.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.\n- Context Variables:\n  - `category_page_id`: string\n  - `category_name`: string\n  - `category_articles`: list of dict (keys: article_id, title, author, date)\n- Navigation Mappings:\n  - `sort-by-date` and `sort-by-popularity` trigger sorting on the category page.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` navigates to dashboard.\n\n---\n\n### 9. search_results.html\n- File: `templates/search_results.html`\n- Page Title: `Search Results`\n- H1 Title: `Search Results`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `search-results-page` (Div): Container for search results page.\n  - `search-query-display` (Div): Displays the search query string.\n  - `results-list` (Div): List of search results.\n  - `no-results-message` (Div): Displayed if no results found.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.\n- Context Variables:\n  - `search_results_page_id`: string\n  - `search_query`: string\n  - `results_list`: list of dict (keys: article_id, title, excerpt)\n- Navigation Mappings:\n  - `back-to-dashboard` navigates to dashboard.\n\n---\n\n## 3. Data File Schemas\n\n### 1. Articles Data\n- File path: `data/articles.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views\n- Description: Stores all news article details.\n- Example rows:\n  ```\n  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432\n  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210\n  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891\n  ```\n\n### 2. Categories Data\n- File path: `data/categories.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): category_id|category_name|description\n- Description: Stores information about article categories.\n- Example rows:\n  ```\n  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations\n  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage\n  3|Business|Business and finance news\n  ```\n\n### 3. Bookmarks Data\n- File path: `data/bookmarks.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date\n- Description: Stores bookmarked articles by users.\n- Example rows:\n  ```\n  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20\n  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18\n  ```\n\n### 4. Comments Data\n- File path: `data/comments.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date\n- Description: Stores user comments on articles.\n- Example rows:\n  ```\n  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20\n  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19\n  ```\n\n### 5. Trending Data\n- File path: `data/trending.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period\n- Description: Stores data on trending articles, views, and time period.\n- Example rows:\n  ```\n  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week\n  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week\n  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month\n  ```\n\n---\n\nThis design_spec.md provides all necessary details for Backend and Frontend teams to implement the NewsPortal application independently and consistently as per user requirements.\n"})

  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: News Portal - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.   - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.   - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.   - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.  ### 2. Article Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Article Catalog - **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.   - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.   - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).   - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.   - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).  ### 3. Article Details Page - **Page Title**: Article Details - **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article. - **Elements**:   - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.   - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.   - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.   - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.   - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.   - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.  ### 4. Bookmarks Page - **Page Title**: My Bookmarks - **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options. - **Elements**:   - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.   - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.   - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).   - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 5. Comments Page - **Page Title**: Article Comments - **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments. - **Elements**:   - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.   - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.   - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.   - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. Write Comment Page - **Page Title**: Write a Comment - **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.   - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.   - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.   - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.   - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.  ### 7. Trending Articles Page - **Page Title**: Trending Articles - **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement. - **Elements**:   - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.   - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.   - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).   - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Category Page - **Page Title**: Category Articles - **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category. - **Elements**:   - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.   - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.   - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.   - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.   - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 9. Search Results Page - **Page Title**: Search Results - **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query. - **Elements**:   - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.   - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.   - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.   - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. Articles Data - **File Name**: `articles.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891   ```  ### 2. Categories Data - **File Name**: `categories.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   category_id|category_name|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations   2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage   3|Business|Business and finance news   ```  ### 3. Bookmarks Data - **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20   2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18   ```  ### 4. Comments Data - **File Name**: `comments.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20   2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19   ```  ### 5. Trending Data - **File Name**: `trending.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month   ```
